title: Medleyb
compiled_truth: Medleyb is an external contact at [Gtlaw](companies/gtlaw). Over the corpus period (2001-05-30 to 2001-06-07), Medleyb sent 8 and received 13 emails, totalling 21 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (8), [Ben Jacoby](people/ben-jacoby) (7), [Steven Krimsky](people/steven-krimsky) (6), [Orshefskyd](people/orshefskyd-gtlaw) (2), [Steve Krimsky](people/steve-krimsky) (1).
